products.name: Royal Banarasi Silk Saree
products.shortDescription: Luxurious zari work with rich bridal detailing.
products.description: Crafted for grand celebrations, this Banarasi silk saree blends heritage weaving, premium zari motifs, and a regal drape for wedding and festive occasions.

products.name: Kanchipuram Temple Border Saree
products.shortDescription: Classic gold temple border with vibrant body tones.
products.description: A timeless Kanchipuram saree with a ceremonial temple border, hand-finished texture, and elegant pallu for festive dressing.

products.name: Soft Linen Printed Saree
products.shortDescription: Breathable comfort with elegant floral printing.
products.description: Designed for day-long ease, this linen blend saree offers soft texture, subtle prints, and versatile styling for office and casual wear.

products.name: Chiffon Partywear Saree
products.description: An effortless partywear pick featuring fluid chiffon drape, subtle shimmer accents, and a polished evening-ready finish.

products.name: Cotton Handloom Saree
products.shortDescription: Handloom comfort with elegant contrast stripes.
products.description: A breathable cotton handloom saree built for all-day wear, featuring artisanal weaving and understated elegance for work and daytime events.

products.name: Designer Georgette Saree
products.shortDescription: Contemporary designer drape with embellished blouse piece.
products.description: Modern georgette styling with graceful fall, embellished details, and versatile elegance for receptions and curated evening looks.
